metadata.title: ものみなこぞりて
metadata.subtitle: All Creatures of Our God and King / Canticle of the Sun — Japanese, tr. Nakayama Masaki
metadata.composer: Anonymous (16th c.), tune "Lasst uns erfreuen" from Geistliche Kirchengesäng, Köln (1623)
metadata.lyricist: St. Francis of Assisi (1181–1226), "Canticle of the Sun" — Japanese translation by Nakayama Masaki 中山昌樹 (1886–1944)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Original by St. Francis of Assisi (d. 1226) is PD by > 700 years. Tune "Lasst uns erfreuen" from a 1623 Köln hymnal is PD by > 400 years. Japanese translation by Nakayama Masaki (d. 1944) — > 70 years post-mortem, PD per Japanese copyright law. First published in 讃美歌 (1931 / 1954 no. 75). Wikipedia ja quotes the full translation

chordpro:
{title: ものみなこぞりて}
{subtitle: All Creatures of Our God and King — Japanese, 讃美歌 75, tr. 中山昌樹}
{key: D}
{time: 3/4}
{tempo: 100}
{comment: Based on St. Francis of Assisi's "Canticle of the Sun" (c. 1224). Hallelujahs come 5× in the Japanese version, 7× in English.}

{start_of_verse: 1}
[D]ものみな[A]こ[D]ぞ[A]りて [D]みかみを[A]たた[D]えよ
mono mina kozorite, mikami wo tataeyo
[D]ハレル[A]ヤ [G]ハレル[A]ヤ
hareruya, hareruya
[D]光のも[A]となる [G]日を造[D]りましし
hikari no moto naru, hi wo tsukuri mashishi
[Bm]みかみを[F#m]た[G]たえ[A]よ
mikami wo tataeyo
[D]ハレル[A]ヤ [G]ハレル[D]ヤ [A]ハレル[D]ヤ
hareruya, hareruya, hareruya
{end_of_verse}

{start_of_verse: 2}
[D]月かげ[A]さ[D]や[A]かに [D]み空にか[A]がや[D]く
tsukikage sayaka ni, mi-sora ni kagayaku
[D]ハレル[A]ヤ [G]ハレル[A]ヤ
hareruya, hareruya
[D]きらめく[A]星をも [G]静かにみ[D]ちびく
kirameku hoshi wo mo, shizuka ni michibiku
[Bm]みかみを[F#m]た[G]たえ[A]よ
mikami wo tataeyo
[D]ハレル[A]ヤ [G]ハレル[D]ヤ [A]ハレル[D]ヤ
hareruya, hareruya, hareruya
{end_of_verse}

{start_of_verse: 3}
[D]小川の[A]流[D]れ[A]は [D]ほめごと[A]ささ[D]やく
ogawa no nagare wa, homegoto sasayaku
[D]ハレル[A]ヤ [G]ハレル[A]ヤ
hareruya, hareruya
[D]実りも[A]豊けき [G]大地を[D]与えし
minori mo yutakeki, daichi wo ataeshi
[Bm]みかみを[F#m]た[G]たえ[A]よ
mikami wo tataeyo
[D]ハレル[A]ヤ [G]ハレル[D]ヤ [A]ハレル[D]ヤ
hareruya, hareruya, hareruya
{end_of_verse}

{start_of_verse: 4}
[D]世の悩[A]み[D]も[A]死も [D]いかで恐[A]るべ[D]き
yo no nayami mo shi mo, ikade osoru beki
[D]ハレル[A]ヤ [G]ハレル[A]ヤ
hareruya, hareruya
[D]たがいに[A]助くる [G]心を賜[D]いし
tagai ni tasukuru, kokoro wo tamaishi
[Bm]みかみを[F#m]た[G]たえ[A]よ
mikami wo tataeyo
[D]ハレル[A]ヤ [G]ハレル[D]ヤ [A]ハレル[D]ヤ
hareruya, hareruya, hareruya
{end_of_verse}
